# Vendor Standards

Ready White fulfills through standardized subcontractor packages. Vendor operations should be repeatable, measurable, and redundant.

## Fulfillment Model

Use:
- preset package buy rates
- standard size bands
- standard add-ons
- exception escalation workflows

Do not build around flat hourly labor. Hourly/change-order rates are only for severe prep, water damage, smoke/stain blocking, custom repairs, or approved scope exceptions.

## Vendor Scorecard

Track:
- assignment response time
- schedule confirmation time
- on-time arrival
- on-time completion
- photo proof completeness
- callback rate
- rework severity
- customer/property-manager feedback
- communication quality
- capacity reliability

## Required Vendor Behaviors

Vendors must:
- acknowledge assignments within SLA
- confirm schedule and access details
- complete the standardized scope
- notify Ready White before out-of-scope work
- provide required photo proof
- report blockers immediately
- preserve property-manager relationship quality

## Callback Tracking

Callbacks should be logged by:
- job
- vendor
- issue type
- severity
- root cause
- resolution time
- margin impact

Repeated callback patterns should affect vendor assignment priority.
